narrative:
Whetstone Twp South (precinct in Crawford County) has 558 registered voters, with 46.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 43.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.5 percentage points.
